Who We Are

Local agents who actually live here.

Rockland Real Estate was founded in 2009 by neighbors who knew every cul-de-sac, school district, and farmers market in the county. We're not a national franchise — we're the team you'll run into at the hardware store.

Every client works directly with a named agent from first showing to closing day. No call centers, no handoffs.

DW
Dana Whitfield Principal Broker · Lic. NY #10401
